headline: 3 Dirt-Cheap Stocks Under $45 Built to Outperform in a Volatile Market
summary: Volatility can lower the cost of entry into businesses that throw off real cash, even as investors recognize that a low share price alone is no guarantee of a bargain. Heading into the back half of 2026, three blue-chip names trading well below the $45 mark stand out for the same reason: predictable cash flows, ... 3 Dirt-Cheap Stocks Under $45 Built to Outperform in a Volatile Market
